title: artemisia maritima var. gallica
intro: Artemisia maritima var. gallica, also known as Gallic Sea Wormwood, is a subspecies of the Sea Wormwood plant native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Gallic Sea Wormwood include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to help with wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Artemisia maritima var. gallica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
